name: Hangzhou DPtech Technologies Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hangzhou DPtech Technologies Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells network security and application delivery products and solutions in China. The company offers application firewall, intrusion prevention system, bandwidth management, deep packet inspection, Web application firewall, anti-DDoS, application network, industrial Ethernet, unified threat management, and WLAN products, as well as technical solutions. It serves customers in various industries, such as service providers, governments, power grid, finance, education, etc. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.
